heading: Oplog Requirements
body:
Source cluster requirements:

- To ensure that the live migration's lag window stays within the bounds
  of the oplog replication lag window, do one of the following actions
  on the source cluster:

  - [minimum retention window for Oplog entries](set-oplog-min-window).
    Use this option if storage [Cluster Auto-Scaling](cluster-autoscaling)
    is enabled (this is the default) on the source cluster.

  - [Set Oplog Size](set-oplog-size). Use this option
    if you disable storage auto-scaling on the source cluster.

Destination cluster requirements:

- To accommodate potential storage size fluctuations related to oplog
  size requirements, we recommend that you choose a destination cluster
  tier that is at least two tiers above the source cluster.
